title: Repainted Storage
description: Updates Refined Storage's textures to be more in-line with vanilla's
body:
**Repainted Storage** attempts to update [Refined Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refined-storage)'s textures to better fit Minecraft's art style.

**This resource pack requires [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)**.

> ### Under Construction!
> Repainted Storage is in **beta!**  
> This means that some textures have not been updated yet, and everything is subject to change.
